name: Beijing Tiantan Biological Products Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Tiantan Biological Products Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale and consulting of blood products in China. Its products include blood intravenous injection immunoglobulin; blood human albumin; blood injection immunoglobulin; hepatitis B, freeze-dried hepatitis B, and tetanus human immunoglobulin; and human immunoglobulin. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Beijing, China.
